tips.tip: [LTV] Navigate to the faction tab (Command > Faction) to manage ships owned by your faction.
[LTV] Press on the colony income label to open a detailed breakdown panel.
[LTV] Trade missions are dispatched in discrete cycles configurable through LunaLib settings.
[LTV] The informal sector seeks imbalances between supply and demand to make a quick buck.
[LTV] Factions can be embargoed at a relation cost (Command > Faction > Administration).
[LTV] There is no limit to transferring credits to a colony. But only a limited amount can be withdrawn per month.
[LTV] Colony-relevant trade missions can be viewed by pressing Ctrl+3 in the Colony Info menu.
[LTV] Income and upkeep multipliers only affect industries.
[LTV] Once enabled, a policy cannot be disabled.
[LTV] An unhealthy population decreases ground defenses and population growth, while an unhappy population decreases stability and productivity.
[LTV] Increasing the rate of exploitation decreases worker wages, but causes unhappiness. If the population cannot afford basic goods, it degrades their health.
[LTV] Don't let class consciousness get too high.
[LTV] All colony-related expenses and income are realized at the end of the month.
[LTV] Vitalize your day with Bres Vitalis!
[LTV] The number of assembly lines owned by the faction can be increased through policies.
[LTV] Paying independent captains for haulage is generally less profitable than using faction-owned fleets.
[LTV] Detailed information about the economy can be found under the intel tab (Intel > Economy).
[LTV] Watch the sector's heartbeat! (Intel > Economy > Trade Routes)
[LTV] The trade routes map has an option to exclusively show real fleets for raiding.
[LTV] Your faction's population can be seen at a glance (Command > Colonies > Population metrics).
[LTV] A self-sufficient faction is an unbeatable faction (Command > Colonies > Faction resources).
[LTV] Colonies in debt suffer from stability and upkeep maluses.
[LTV] Faction-owned ships require supplies and crew to maintain.
[LTV] Detailed configuration of the mod is made easier with LunaLib.
